parameters.content:
## Generate Social Card

Content platforms and developer blogs use this recipe to generate an Open Graph image for social sharing. Define a canvas with your brand background and render the article title, description, and site name — ready for an og:image meta tag with a consistent, eye-catching preview.

**Note:** This workflow uses the Iteration Layer community node (`n8n-nodes-iterationlayer`). Install it via Settings > Community Nodes before importing. Self-hosted n8n only.

### Step 1: Generate Image
Resource: **Image Generation**

Configure the Image Generation parameters below, then connect your credentials.
